package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "net/http"
    "os/exec"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for cache_interface_method_missing_context: shows the risky shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: Cache-oriented interfaces whose IO-style methods omit context.Context.
type Worker struct { ctx context.Context }

func PositiveCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContext(ctx context.Context, url string) {
    child, _ := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    _ = child
    http.Get(url)
    exec.Command("curl", url).Run()
    go func() { http.Get(url) }()
    for {
        select { default: time.Sleep(time.Millisecond) }
    }
}
